title: Liable To Cease
text:
## 2. About Māra (2nd)

At Sāvatthī. Seated to one side, Venerable Rādha said to the Buddha: “Sir, they speak of ‘liable to cease’. What is liable to cease?” “Rādha, form, feeling, perception, choices, and consciousness are liable to cease. Seeing this … They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
